just-black.$description: Page canvas, footer surface, deep section backgrounds

surface-cream.$description: Primary text, outlined button borders, nav links; the default light used for ghost controls and headings

surface-50.$description: Muted secondary text, icon fills at rest, disabled labels

surface-25.$description: Hairline borders and dividers against the black canvas

off-black.$description: Nested panels and code blocks, one step above the canvas

shockingly-green.$description: GSAP brand green: links, tags, gradient-stroke CTA. Never a filled CTA color

light-green.$description: Light green gradient endpoint and 'Other' category label

orangey.$description: SVG category label and orange-tool icon fills

pink.$description: Scroll category label and decorative splashes

lilac.$description: Text category label and thin illustrative strokes

blue.$description: UI category label and cool gradient endpoints

micro.$description: Hover states on pills and nav links; opacity/border shifts only

reveal.$description: Default entrance for cards and copy blocks scrolling into view

hero.$description: Display-type entrances and gradient blob drifts on the hero

stagger.$description: Per-item offset for staggered lists, chars, and card grids

community.design-tokens.brand.voice: A motion library showing off: massive cream type on a near-black stage, color as taxonomy, everything weightless and outlined.
community.design-tokens.brand.essence: An animated chalkboard in a design studio: near-black wall, warm cream chalk, and five color-coded highlighters — one per animation discipline (green GSAP, orange SVG, pink Scroll, violet Text, blue UI). Color functions as taxonomy, not decoration; typography is the hero.
community.design-tokens.brand.imageryStyle: Soft 3D organic shapes — pills, domes, liquid blobs — lit from within by multi-stop gradients in the discipline accent colors, loosely contained and overlapping adjacent type. No photography, no drop shadows.
avoid: new category colors beyond the five

components.name: Outlined Cream Pill Button
components.spec: Transparent fill, 1px #fffce1 border, 100px radius, 15px/24px padding, Mori 18px 600. Never filled with color.

components.name: Category Color Label
components.spec: Single word in its discipline hue: Scroll #fec5fb, SVG #ff8709, Text #9d95ff, UI #00bae2, GSAP #0ae448. Never reuse a hue for a different discipline.

components.name: Curly-Bracket Annotation
components.spec: 16–19px Mori 400 cream text wrapped in literal `{ }` braces. No background, no border.

animations.name: Hero Type Reveal
Scroll Section Reveal
animations.role: Default entrance for cards and copy scrolling into view

animations.name: Gradient Blob Drift
Pill Hover
animations.spec:
Border opacity shift only — no fill, no scale beyond 1.02.

```js
button.addEventListener("mouseenter", () =>
  gsap.to(button, { borderColor: "rgba(255,252,225,0.8)",
    scale: 1.02, duration: 0.2, ease: "power1.out" })  // motion.micro
);
```

animations.name: Pinned Tool Showcase
animations.role: Scroll-driven walkthrough of the four discipline blocks

dos: Use the five-discipline color mapping for every category label
Render every button as a 100px-radius ghost pill with a 1px cream border
Introduce every section with a `{ }` curly-bracket annotation
Let the hero headline bleed to the viewport edge at lh 0.9
donts: Don't add filled CTA buttons — outlined-only system
Don't use pure #ffffff text or #000000 background
Don't apply drop shadows — depth comes from gradients and surface steps
Don't scrub entrance animations — reveals fire once and settle

surfaces.name: Nested Panel
surfaces.purpose: Footer and code blocks, one step lifted

elevation.cards: none — separation via 8px radius and 24px gaps, not box-shadow
elevation.illustrations: none — depth from internal multi-stop gradients

community.design-tokens.brand.layout: Full-bleed dark canvas, ~1280px content max-width, 80–120px section gaps. Repeating section pattern: curly-bracket eyebrow, then a centered headline or a two-column row (organic illustration left, category label + subhead + body + pill button right), separated by 1px #42433d hairlines.

similarBrands.name: Framer
similarBrands.note: single dark canvas, massive display type, ghost controls

similarBrands.name: Linear
similarBrands.note: dark UI with category-level color coding

similarBrands.name: Spline
similarBrands.note: soft 3D organic shapes lit by internal gradients
